title: Drug Trafficking Network Busted: Ganja Seized in Multi-State Operation
author: Unknown
key_facts: A multi-state operation was conducted on May 12 by the Chennai Zonal Unit of NCB in coordination with the Telangana Police.
A container truck carrying contraband was intercepted at the Nallur toll plaza near Chennai.
Officials discovered ganja concealed inside a specially designed false ceiling and hidden cavities within the container vehicle.
The seized ganja was being transported from Malkangiri district in Odisha and was allegedly headed for Madurai in Tamil Nadu.
Arrested persons involved in the operation are natives of Odisha and Bihar.
The seizure disrupted a major drug supply chain operating between Odisha, Andhra Pradesh, and Tamil Nadu.
Efforts are under way to apprehend the alleged mastermind of the network and owner of the seized vehicle, who has been traced to Odisha.
